text: Papa ne aaj bina mujhse pooche sasural walo ko bol diya ki main kabhi job nahi karungi, taaki mere past inter-caste relationship ka mudda phirse na uthe. Main is joint family aur saas ke taano ke beech apni identity kho chuki hoon, par unke faisle ka virodh nahi kar sakti. 'Log kya kahenge' aur bacchon ke future ke darr se main chup-chap sab seh rahi hoon taaki dono gharo ki izzat bani rahe.

Papa ne aaj achanak faisla suna diya ki meri choti behen ka love marriage nahi hoga aur uska rishta hamari hi caste mein tay kar diya hai. Saas ke kalesh ke beech meri apni shaadi shuda zindagi ek mazaak ban chuki hai, par main behen ke haq mein baap se bagawat nahi kar sakti. Ek aadarsh beti aur bahu hone ka bojh uthate huye main chup hoon taaki khandaan ki 'izzat' mitti mein na mile.

Mere college ke pyaar ko caste mismatch bol kar thukrane ke baad, Papa ne aaj bina pooche mera dusra bacha plan karne ka faisla saas ke sath milkar le liya. Is child pressure aur career gap ke karan main ghut rahi hoon, par main apne pita aur sasural ki authority ko challenge nahi kar sakti. Apne sapno ko kurban karke main ye saari shartein maan rahi hoon taaki parivaar ki maryada bani rahe.

Bhai ka inter-religion love marriage todne ke liye Papa ne aaj bina pooche kisi aur ladki se uski kundali milwa li aur dowry ki baat shuru kar di. Main apni lost identity aur saas-bahu dynamics mein itni uljhi hoon ki is na-insafi par ek shabd nahi bol pa rahi. Rishte kharab na ho aur sasural mein mera tamasha na bane, isliye main bas chup-chap baith kar apne farz ke naam par ye sab seh rahi hoon.

Papa ne aaj mere pati ke samne bina pooche keh diya ki agar maine saas se kalesh karke divorce liya, toh wo mujhe apne ghar nahi rakhenge kyunki unhe mere purane love marriage wale chakkar se aaj bhi nafrat hai. Ek dependent homemaker hone ke naate main andar se bilkul toot gayi hoon, par rishto ka lihaz rakhte huye main khamosh rahi. Bacchon ki parvarish aur 'log kya kahenge' ke darr se main is toxic marriage mein aage bhi ghutne ko taiyar hoon.
